positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for badults_pos
% SZS output start Proof for badults_pos
2. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [input(axiom)]
3. script_editor(andrew_collins,badults) [input(axiom)]
4. ? [X0] : (script_editor(andrew_collins,X0) & working_title(X0,secret_dude_society)) [input(conjecture)]
5. ~? [X0] : (script_editor(andrew_collins,X0) & working_title(X0,secret_dude_society)) [negated conjecture 4]
6. ! [X0] : (~script_editor(andrew_collins,X0) | ~working_title(X0,secret_dude_society)) [ennf transformation 5]
10. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 2]
11. script_editor(andrew_collins,badults) [cnf transformation 3]
12. ~script_editor(andrew_collins,X0) | ~working_title(X0,secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 6]
13. ~working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [resolution 11,12]
14. $false [forward subsumption resolution 13,10]
% SZS output end Proof for badults_pos
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for badults_neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    badults != andrew_collins).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    badults != secret_dude_society).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    andrew_collins != secret_dude_society).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define working_title(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define script_editor(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
